headline: GOP Urges Democrats To Tone Down Rhetoric Used To Quote President Verbatim

headline: Study Contends Free Will Disproven By Fact That Humans Repeatedly Eat At Jimmy John’s

headline: Why Burnham is honour-bound to call an election while Reform still lead in the polls
